claim_bullets.bullet_text: Unconscious and Death rules explain character status conditions and suggest role‑play implications (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.1-7).
Precautions When Using skills provide guidance for players and the GM, stressing careful skill application (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.1-7).
Other Tan Combat And Magic outlines combat abilities and magic interactions, possibly influencing combat outcomes (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.1-7).

source_record_text: Front matter of Sword World RPG: introduction, game roles, rulebook meaning, structure, and basic gameplay concepts.
